exact_strategy: Default performance-mode + decorative motion/effect throttle + reduced decorative geometry density.
css_changes_summary: Added performance-mode block with PERF-SLICE-1-MOTION-THROTTLE marker.
Disabled high-cost decorative animations in performance-mode.
Reduced heavy filter/glow load for animated neural visuals.
js_changes_summary: Added PERF_SLICE_1_MOTION_THROTTLE config + default mode activation in init().
Reduced brain-field orbit/fiber/neuron/link counts in performance mode.
Disabled decorative spark/particle effects in performance mode.
risk: 1% low FPS may still require next slices.
rollback_notes: Revert CSS performance-mode block and JS PERF-SLICE-1-MOTION-THROTTLE section.
